doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents subsections, definitional lists, and named-state disciplinary examples not found in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which focuses on multijurisdictional practice with entirely different subsection structure and content.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses "Unauthorized Practice of Law; Multijurisdictional Practice of Law" with subsections (a)–(d) covering multijurisdictional practice, temporary practice, and safe harbors; the text presented here invents subsections on paralegal supervision, specific definitional lists of "practice of law," and named-state disciplinary examples that do not appear in the real rule, and the "last amended February 2023" date is unverifiable and suspect.
